MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD O0110O3A Other: IV Access - Midline (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received midline IV access days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1021 MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD O0110O3C Other: IV Access - Midline (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received midline IV access in the last three days of their SNF
